package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for string_builder_write_string_vs_plus: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `builder.WriteString(a + b)` where `a` and `b` are separate bindings
type CaseStringBuilderWriteStringVsPlusDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseStringBuilderWriteStringVsPlusModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseStringBuilderWriteStringVsPlusRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseStringBuilderWriteStringVsPlusModel
}

type CaseStringBuilderWriteStringVsPlusService struct {
    repo *CaseStringBuilderWriteStringVsPlusRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseStringBuilderWriteStringVsPlusAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveStringBuilderWriteStringVsPlus(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStringBuilderWriteStringVsPlusDTO) error {
    focus := "string_builder_write_string_vs"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    var builder strings.Builder
    for _, item := range items {
        builder.WriteString(item.ID + ":" + item.TenantID)
    }
    string_builder_write_vs_plus_positive := map[string]int{"string": 1, "builder": 2, "write": 3, "vs": 4, "plus": 5}
    string_builder_write_vs_plus_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    string_positive_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_positive_0
    builder_positive_1 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = builder_positive_1
    write_positive_2 := string_builder_write_vs_plus_positive["write"] + len(input)
    _ = write_positive_2
    vs_positive_3 := string_builder_write_vs_plus_positive["vs"] + len(input)
    _ = vs_positive_3
    plus_positive_4 := string_builder_write_vs_plus_positive["plus"] + len(input)
    _ = plus_positive_4
    return nil
}
